text: phone at 15% and no charger in sight. this is how i die
someone stole my charger at work. i will find you and i will judge you
347 unread notifications. im not popular im just in too many group chats
left the group chat. got added back. left again. added back. this is prison
spent 20 minutes analyzing the tone of a 3 word text. 'sounds good' WHAT DOES IT MEAN
read receipts are a form of psychological warfare and should be banned
got a voicemail and my anxiety went from 0 to 100. who leaves voicemails in 2026
phone at 3% and im 20 min from home. driving without gps like its 1997
my coworker borrowed my charger and returned it with a frayed cable. violence was considered
silenced 14 group chats. peace was never an option but silence is
the group chat has 847 messages and none of them involve me but i still have to scroll
they said 'ok' instead of 'okay' and i spiraled for an hour
blue check marks mean they saw it. no reply means im dead to them
someone called me on the phone. no text first. just called. like a psychopath
phone died at the grocery store. had to remember things with my brain like an animal
charger only works at a specific angle. my phone is on life support
muted the family group chat 3 years ago. best decision ive ever made
work slack has 200 notifications. personal phone has 0. makes sense
overanalyzed a text for 45 min then replied 'lol nice'
turned off read receipts so nobody knows i saw their message and chose chaos
voicemail notification just sitting there. no i will not listen to it. ever
bring a charger to dinner or dont talk to me
someone said 'we need to talk' over text. funeral arrangements pending
my phone screen time report is a hate crime against my self esteem
group chat named 'quick question' has 4000 messages. none are quick. none are questions
she texted 'k' and i have not recovered
read the message. put the phone down. forgot to reply. its been 3 weeks
someone left me a 3 minute voicemail. i will never know what it said
phone hit 1% and i made peace with the universe
borrowed a charger and it was usb-c. i have lightning. pain is universal
app notifications at 6am on a saturday should be illegal
escaped the group chat. they made a new one. added me. nowhere is safe
period at the end of a text means youre angry. no one can convince me otherwise
double blue ticks and no response for 6 hours. planning my emotional funeral
havent checked voicemail since 2023. its probably fine
low battery mode is just my phone telling me to get my life together
left my charger at the hotel. $35 for a gas station cable that lasted 2 days
push notifications are just my phone yelling at me all day
the group chat is arguing about where to eat dinner. its been 4 hours. we ate separately
analyzed my crush's text for punctuation clues. they used an exclamation point. were basically married
left on read for 2 days. they were 'busy'. sure. cool. fine. im fine
unknown number called me. let it ring. googled the number. it was my dentist
phone at 5% and uber is 8 minutes away. living on the edge literally
someone used my charger and didnt plug it back in. society has failed
enabled do not disturb. missed 47 messages. enabled anxiety instead
group chat consensus: impossible. group chat drama: guaranteed
they replied with a thumbs up emoji. what does that MEAN. are we ok
read receipt showed 'seen 3:42am' and now they know i have no sleep schedule
voicemail transcription said something about 'urgent matter' so naturally im ignoring it harder
power bank is dead. phone is dead. im dead inside. complete set
ex still in the group chat. every message is a landmine
someone texted 'haha' instead of 'hahaha' and i felt the distance immediately
turned off all notifications. now i just check my phone manually every 30 seconds
wireless charger charges at the speed of continental drift
badge count on my email app is 12847. no i will not open it
group chat name changes every 3 hours. currently called 'council of chaos'. accurate
text said 'no worries' but the period said 'many worries'
they sent a voice note. im in public. this is an act of aggression
voicemail box full. problem solved itself honestly
phone at 20%. entering conservation mode. no more frivolous texts
charger cable is 2 feet long. my bed is 3 feet from the outlet. constant suffering
245 emails, 67 texts, 14 app notifications. touched grass instead
the typing bubble appeared then disappeared. the emotional whiplash is real
read receipts off but i still know. i ALWAYS know
someone called without texting first. blocked. jk. but considered it
battery saver makes my screen so dim i need a flashlight to see it. ironic
airport charger station is the modern day watering hole. we gather. we charge. we leave
work group chat on a weekend. i saw nothing. i know nothing. i was not here
group chat renamed to 'stop renaming the group chat'. renamed again immediately
double text anxiety is real. sent 2 messages in a row. might as well propose now
they left my message on read and posted an instagram story. the AUDACITY
listening to a voicemail is emotional labor i did not sign up for
phone hit 0% but still showed the screen for 3 more seconds. those were precious seconds
found a charger in lost and found. finders keepers. survival of the fittest
notification sound at 3am woke me up. it was duolingo. threatening me. again
group chat: 'does 7 work for everyone' 14 messages later nobody knows what time dinner is
three dots appeared for 5 min. they sent 'hey'. FIVE MINUTES FOR HEY??
screenshot the text to 4 friends for analysis before replying 'sure lol'
no voicemail means no problem. that is my official policy
phone went from 30% to 5% in 10 minutes. battery is a liar and a thief
someone shared their location in the group chat and it was applebees. respect lost
notification said 'your screen time is up 47% this week' mind ya business apple
they hearted my message instead of replying. conversation over i guess
read receipt showed they saw my text at 2pm. its 11pm. the reply was not worth the wait
voicemail from mom: 3 minutes long. content: call me back. every time
portable charger is my emotional support device at this point
accidentally liked a text from 2 months ago while scrolling. moving to a new city now
group chat sends 100 messages while im in a meeting. its always memes. important memes
tone of 'fine' in a text depends entirely on who sent it. fine is never fine
sent a text to the wrong person. it was about them. im in witness protection now
voicemail: hi this is-- DELETED. dont care. if its important theyll text
phone at 99% and i still feel anxious. this is not about the battery anymore
someone removed me from the group chat and nobody told me. found out 3 days later
green bubble in a blue bubble group chat. the tension is palpable
my phone fell behind the bed while charging. the cable saved it. charger is the real mvp
the audacity of an app asking me to rate it via notification. 1 star for asking
left a voice note and listened to it 4 times before sending. still hated my voice
all my chargers are in the other room. this is a hostage situation
group chat goes quiet for 2 days then explodes at 1am. every time
